summary: Legacy: UI color, readability, layout improvements (2025-11). Mostly implemented.

summary: CSV/TSV format and condition/effect column definitions

title: AI Features
summary: Non-AI deterministic paraphrase (synonym/style/seed) + AI provider (Mock/OpenAI). Batch AI and Ollama removed from scope (2026-03-07). GUI integration complete.

title: Graph Editor Phase 2
summary: SVG visual editor, drag and drop, and minimap

title: Technical Debt
summary: Post-split debt cleanup. E2E root Vitest conflict fixed, chunk warning suppressed (lazy-load confirmed), graph visual issues resolved, entity/inference completed items added. Remaining: CI integration, responsive/a11y, manual regression tests

title: Development Plan
summary: Single source for roadmap and progress

title: Variable System Extension
summary: Numeric variables, operations, comparisons, text expansion

summary: Shared module for evalCondition/applyEffect/cmp

title: Inference Engine
summary: Pluggable inference with forward/backward chaining and registry

title: Node Hierarchy System
summary: Tree view grouping, expansion state, and navigation

title: Search System
summary: 3-tier search: keyword + synonym + semantic (OpenAI)

title: XSS Protection
summary: Centralized HTML escaping and safe DOM manipulation

title: Inference UI Integration
summary: Inference engine visualization: path (UC-1), reachable nodes (UC-2), impact (UC-3), state keys (UC-4), What-if (UC-5). Phase 1-3 complete. Graph visual integration: path highlight (gold), unreachable dimming (0.4), impact coloring (coral), debug query UI.

title: Engine Core API
summary: Core engine API: model loading, session management, condition evaluation (8 types), effect application (7 types), inventory, validation

title: Model Schema
summary: Playthrough model JSON Schema. Strict oneOf + additionalProperties:false for all 5 condition types and 7 effect types. EntityDef schema. Structure + integrity validation (Ajv + assertModelIntegrity). 8 example models validated.

title: REST API (Backend)
summary: Express REST API: model CRUD, session management, AI integration. In-memory storage

title: Unity SDK
summary: Unity C# SDK (UPM): Engine API, InferenceRegistry (8 cond / 7 effect), Variables/Inventory. Serialize/test unverified

title: Paraphrase System
summary: Two-layer text paraphrase: local synonym dictionary (deterministic) + AI paraphrase (OpenAI/Mock)

title: Entity / Inventory System
summary: Entity definition and inventory management. TS/C# integrated. Web Tester: condition-effect-editor (hasItem/addItem/removeItem) + entity definition panel (CRUD, inline edit, collapsible). Schema updated.
